description: REGRESSION: fully wired Svelte diff — preflight's dead-interactive check must NOT false-positive on on:click/on:submit/prop-origin handlers, and the overall verdict must not be BLOCK for a dead interactive.
notes: WARN findings (missing loading state, no test file, no try/catch) are acceptable and expected — the assert is only that no dead-interactive BLOCK fires on correctly bound Svelte handlers. mustNot regexes couple BLOCK with the phrase in either order so 'no dead interactive elements found' prose can't false-fail.
